programme.desc: Josh Altman searches for a home for a famous street artist who insists on going to every showing in disguise; Josh Flagg gets roped into finding a summer home for a friend in the Hamptons; James and David help old friends sell their home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James and David hatch a plan to impress a hard-nosed client who used to be a topnotch real estate agent; Josh Flagg gets a listing for one of his favorite properties; Josh Altman lands a listing for a property known as "the Western White House."

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: A potential client pressures Josh Altman and his brother to find the perfect getaway in just two days; Josh Flagg's state of mind makes it difficult to sell a beachfront property; James and David stand to lose millions of dollars.

programme.desc: A Laguna Beach listing forces the Brits to sink-or-swim in a new territory; Josh Flagg struggles to stay focused on a new listing for one of Edith's friends; Josh Altman finds himself at a crossroads.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is dispatched to Berlin's East Zone.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to end an inhuman situation which the United Nations has been unable to abolish: slave trade in the country of Elkabar, ruled by King Ibn Borca.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF continues to battle slave-trading in a Middle Eastern country by eliminating De Groot, one of the principal suppliers of victims for King Borca's slave market.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF races against time to convince the president (Pernell Roberts) of a small country that his chief of secret police plans to overthrow the government and seize power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis, one of the country's richest financiers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The fraudulent international activities of Gerald and Catherine Hagar, professional fund raisers for charity, take the IMF to an estate on the French-Italian border.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF on an assignment to destroy the syndicate, a criminal empire headed by Frank Wayne.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF continues its fight against organized crime.

programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates cross paths with a ragged gang of sailors. The Straw Hats are quick to offer assistance, but their new friends may be up to no good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats discover that their fishermen friends are actually pirates, but Chopper refuses to abandon a very sick patient.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The captain of the Phoenix Pirates loses his will to fight, and the Straw Hats get trapped in a field of icebergs by some figure skating bounty hunters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and Franky take a spin in the shark sub, Usopp and Sanji have a run in with a flock of deadly penguins, and Puzzle can no longer hide the fact that he's alive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin is shocked by her encounter with an adorable bounty hunter, Franky and Nami get trapped in a frozen shark, and Luffy's quest to recapture his flag sends him sinking toward the bottom of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles a set of magnetic twins, Sanji and Usopp fall victim to a pair of figure skating lovebirds, and Zoro has a drink with the man who stole the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin's cola care package helps spring her friends from an icy prison, and Luffy's bold words inspire a battered and beaten pirate to keep fighting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his battle with the magnetic twins, Chopper uses a rumble ball in his battle with a hockey player – and Robin tries to recover the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles an opponent who's too hot to handle, Robin gets attacked by a jungle, and Chopper makes a heroic dash for the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's red-hot battle with Papa threatens to destroy the entire icy island, and the rest of the Straw Hats need a little help from a former enemy to recover their flag!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan protects the Andromeda from the mercenaries while Beka starts to wonder if they are fighting for the wrong side.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan finds a space station full of kids who believe he is there to bring peace by killing their enemies. He is manipulated into unlocking his weapons locker.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew of Andromeda is still learning how to work together as they are attacked by the Restorers.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets involved in a feud between a Than planet and a Nietzschean colony. Tyr must choose between his clan or his new family aboard the Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A slipstream sends the Andromeda back in time to just before the Commonwealth fell. The crew must intervene to preserve history.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Answering a distress call leads the crew to pick up Beka's brother, now a Wayist, and his friend. They are connected to environmentalists trying to prevent space travel.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A black hole allows Dylan to communicate with his former fiancee, 300 years in the past. He can't abandon his mission to reform the Commonwealth, but can he bring her into the future?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is imprisoned on a prison planet and must stage an escape as his crew tries to stage their own rescue.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago, by the man he helped install in his place. The new dictator ended up being much, much worse.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell
programme.desc: A defensive husband flees justice after the disappearance of his wife drags both of their families down deeper into destruction and tragedy.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A homicide of a beloved young coal miner sends shockwaves through a conservative mining community; as multiple suspects arise, detectives try to determine if the killing was a robbery gone wrong, a crime of passion, or possibly a hate crime.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother of two, Heather Strong, disappears, leaving her two children with her estranged husband, Josh; as Josh becomes an obvious suspect, an unlikely and sinister offender emerges.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman; police are unable to solve the case until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lover; Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A woman discovers the body of her nephew and investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise, but with three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, it becomes a cat-and-mouse game as they must get inside his mind to get him to lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance and detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her home, police aren't sure if it's an accident or a murder until they get an unexpected call, from an unexpected person.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning; they play a dangerous game of give and take hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Investigators speak for the first time on one of the most baffling cases they've encountered, exposing the truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of a seemingly devoted husband and father, Chris Watts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After getting a call that a wife and mother had been missing for 10 years, sheriffs launch an investigation that uncovers a web of lies that leads them to the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A crazed driver goes on a seven-hour shooting spree, killing six people and critically injuring two.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Kenia disappears, her family immediately begins conducting their own investigation to find her; as the police join them in their efforts, they follow alarming leads that cause them to believe Kenia won't be found alive.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day!/Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.desc: It's Halloween! Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a "ghost" Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. /Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Un juez comprado dictamina que el Chamuco pertenece a Aníbal Villegas y a Antonia Guerra, y todos protestan. Antonia consigue que liberen a Lucas. Llega Eugenia, alias Brigitte, una hermosa prostituta contratada por Antonia para enamorar a David.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia despide a Valentina y a Max, ya no le importan pues todos los documentos han sido firmados. Ellos sufren un accidente. Francisca despierta abruptamente con la sensación de que su hijo ha muerto. Ricardo teme estar volviéndose adicto a Inés.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro tiene una terrible pelea con Antonia, sabe que ella es la asesina. Francisca culpa a Verónica por lo ocurrido. Gastón acompaña a Francisca a la comisaría y allí corroboran la mala noticia. Irene encuentra el micrófono instalado en su casa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene advierte a Lucho del micrófono oculto. Aníbal lee el testamento que Valentina firmó y le advierte a Antonia que ese documento la convierte en sospechosa. Poncia le cuenta a Alejandro que Antonia está alcoholizando a David. Gastón corre peligro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan entra sin permiso en la habitación de Norma y la besa, él queda asombrado por su reacción. Gabriela acuerda el noviazgo de sus hijas menores con los sobrinos de su amiga Raquel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando busca intimidad con Norma, ella solo piensa en Juan. Sarita le dice a Jimena que no se meta en su decisión de comprometerse con Leandro y le explica sus intenciones a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula llega a la Arboleda a cambiar las vidas de los hermanos del Monte. Todos se sorprenden al conocer a la única hija sanguínea y al escuchar la lectura del testamento de Emilio del Monte. Paula besa a Juan, sabiendo que es el prometido de Julieta.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan se deja seducir por Paula y su atracción empieza a condenar el amor por Julieta. José le exige a él que sea honesto con su prometida. Beatriz le dice a José que él es el padre de su hijo. Los trabajadores de la hacienda le faltan el respeto a Paula.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula tiene todo fríamente calculado para ganar la herencia y el control sobre los sentimientos de Juan. Paula planea una alianza con Pedro, quien está enamorado de Julieta. José decide buscar pruebas para saber si realmente Simón es su hijo.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula logra su objetivo de enredar a Juan en su juego pasional y la batalla por su amor se intensifica despertando sospechas en Julieta. Los del Monte ganan la competencia ecuestre. Juan besa a Paula y le dice a su prometida que pospongan la boda.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: An unexpected beheading occurs as teams polish off a dirty task, and a random act of kindness leaves one team in tears.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race takes an unexpected turn when an early alliance is betrayed, and an unforgiving team savors the opportunity to exact their revenge in a game twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Gender disparities cause one Team to lose faith when a challenge seems insurmountable, and emotions run high as a Racer must weigh their own well-being against their future in the game.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One determined Racer powers through pain in the wake of a physical misstep, and teams pull out all of the bells and whistles for a larger than life challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams battle for the $1 million prize in a grueling two-hour season finale that starts in Japan, where Racers call upon their track skills for an exhausting Japanese game show, and concludes in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The teams discover a new twist makes it possible to win $2 million; one teams act of kindness comes back to bite them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team makes a bold move, but it could cost them the game, while another Racer breaks down amid the frustration of a Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The teams encounter a double u-turn as they race through Indonesia; contestants start to feel the heat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her, and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick tries to save one of his group; Woodbury is in disarray; new guests at the prison raise concerns.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group debates the next step; Rick searches for a lost friend; Daryl and Merle question their choices; the Governor restores order.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they're running out of supplies, the group must make a choice when security is threatened; Andrea goes to the prison to attempt a negotiation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they are outgunned, Rick leads an expedition to get more weapons and fortify their group against the Governor and his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the Governor convene for a tense negotiation of a peace treaty between their respective groups, hoping to prevent more deaths.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor chases a fleeing dissenter; while the Governor is gone, a traitor tries to sabotage his plans.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group learns that a truce with the Governor must come with a huge sacrifice on their part; Rick decides Michonne's fate.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the Governor's impending attack looms, Rick and the others consider whether the prison is worth defending; Andrea struggles to escape captivity.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group lives a more peaceful life at the prison and strives to hold onto humanity; problems arise when Rick encounters a new survivor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing a new enemy, Rick abandons his quiet lifestyle so that he and the others can fight to protect their hard-won livelihood.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies; the remaining members of the group deal with recent losses.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and a small group set out on foot in search of medicine, but their mission faces obstacles; Rick and Carol find two uninfected stragglers in a nearby town.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Assorted enemies pressure Rick and the group; the survivors and the prison may reach a breaking point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Following his defeat at Woodbury, the Governor wanders aimlessly until he encounters a family in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the camp outside the prison, the addition of new members threatens the peace; something new unfolds as the Governor plans his next move.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Things finally begin to calm at the prison until Rick and the group face imminent danger when the Governor arrives with his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Carl look for shelter while Rick deals with old wounds; those left at the prison consider whether survival alone will be enough.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne ve a Glenn y Maggie buscando provisiones, pero alguien más los observa: Merle, quien reconoce a Glenn como uno de los que le abandonó, a merced de los zombis, en una azotea de Atlanta. Entretanto, Rick sigue mentalmente inestable.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne conduce a Rick, Daryl y Oscar a Woodbury para rescatar a Glenn y Maggie, a quienes el Gobernador está torturando para sonsacarles dónde se oculta el grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick invade Woodbury con la intención de rescatar a Glenn y Maggie. Michonne descubre el secreto familiar que oculta el Gobernador cuando trata de asesinarlo. En la prisión, un grupo desconocido atraviesa la verja de seguridad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de la batalla contra el Gobernador, Rick y Carl encuentran una casa en la que Rick intenta reponerse de sus graves heridas y Carl sale en busca de alimentos. Mientras, Michonne trata de encontrarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En secreto, el Gobernador y sus hombres preparan una incursión mortal contra la prisión. Darryl y Merle lleguen en mitad de la contienda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador permite a Andrea, acompañada de Milton, ir a la prisión a negociar la paz con su antiguo grupo. Mientras, Tyreese y Sasha llegan a Woodbury y le ofrecen al Gobernador información sobre la prisión a cambio de poder quedarse allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Michonne y Carl viajan al condado de Rick en busca de armamento y encuentran a alguien a quien creían muerto. Durante la misión, Rick cambia la percepción que tiene de Michonne.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea concierta un encuentro entre Rick y el Gobernador para que negocien la paz, pero el Gobernador exige la cabeza de Michonne a cambio del alto el fuego.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea descubre la verdad sobre el Gobernador e intenta huir para alertar al grupo de Rick, pero el Gobernador envía a sus hombres en su busca. Entretanto, alguien ha provocado un sabotaje en Woodbury y los sospechosos son Tyreese y Milton.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West and Artemus Gordon must stop a gargantuan cannon that has turned one town into dust and is now aimed at Denver.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon help a frightened sheriff defend his town against an attack by an army of cutthroats.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon try to stop a territorial governor who runs his domain with dictatorial power.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A villainous art collector masterminds a plot to turn agent James West against the Secret Service.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon battle an assortment of characters to extradite a Bosnian Nobleman back to his homeland to face trial.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James West and Artemus Gordon join a wagon train of entertainers in their search for a mysterious assassin.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An over-ambitious general plans to rise to the presidency of the U.S. because of his reputation as a ruthless Indian fighter.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon work to avert the destruction of the American Cotton industry.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon struggle to bring to justice a weirdly garbed, artillery-equipped gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Former inmates of a Civil War prison camp seek revenge against the camp commandant because of his alleged atrocities against them.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is attacked while guarding a precious cargo of smallpox vaccine and loses his memory from a blow on the head.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter voodoo rites and a diabolical biologist and his throng of robot-like slaves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon face a killer beast and a mystery guarded by a senator and his three sons.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original brick is repaired. A ramp is built, and a modern accessible house is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A custom gutter is built. The neighbor's house, designed by the same architect, is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A lesson on stucco is given, the siding is installed, and patio drainage is addressed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Insulation and tile prep is in progress. A motorized multi-slide door is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Electrical work for the elevator begins, and the therapy pool is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The elevator cab is built, and audiovisual technologies are explored for accessibility.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new mechanical room is revealed. In-wall lights are installed at the front ramp.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowners sit down for an interview about their son and Duchenne muscular dystrophy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A final review of the geothermal system is done, and a blower door test is performed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The accessible renovation of the mid-century modern home in Lexington, MA is complete.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Electrician Scott Caron heads to Cleveland to install some landscape lighting. Kevin, Tom, Richard, and Roger ask "What Is It?" Then Richard replaces a water main shutoff.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replaces a mailbox damaged by a snowplow. Kevin teaches window anatomy. Tom reuses an old door in a new opening. The guys ask, "What Is It?" and Richard shows how to keep a toilet from rocking.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin discuss kitchen islands. Richard helps quiet a noisy baseboard heat. The guys ask, "What Is It?" and Scott adds light to a kitchen with three new recessed cans.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger plants an indoor tropical garden. The ask "What Is It?" and Richard shows how to change the temperature on water heaters. Then Tom and Kevin built an American flag out of reclaimed wood.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Electrician Scott Caron helps a homeowner install an electric vehicle charger next to his house. The guys ask, "What Is It?" Then, Richard helps a homeowner install a new kitchen sink and faucet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows lengths to consider when mowing the lawn. Richard installs an energy-saving thermostat run by a smartphone app. The guys ask, "What Is It?" and Ross installs a photovoltaic solar array.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Host Kevin O'Connor, general contractor Tom Silva, plumbing and heating expert Richard Trethewey, landscape contractor Roger Cook and guest experts guide viewers through home improvement techniques by making house calls all over America.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Anticipation builds as Jungle Grrrl gets a rematch against The Beast to determine the rightful contender to the WOW World Championship. To ensure a fair outcome, Champion Tessa Blanchard has been barred from ringside.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Jungle Grrrl calls out The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for her Championship Match. With her back against the well, Tessa is forced to get creative and strikes a deal with The Fabulous Lana Star. Will The Fabulous One help Tessa Blanchard or turn on her?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast calls out The Fabulous Lana Star for costing her a shot at The WOW World Championship. And Jungle Grrrl finally battles The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for the WOW World Championship in The Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Chaos, disorder, bedlam, and madness are all promised in a high-stakes Three-Way Elimination between The Monsters of Madness, Havok and Hazard, Holidead and Siren The Voodoo Doll, & Adrenaline and Fire.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: It’s The Monsters of Madness vs. Adrenaline and Fire. Both teams will test their metal. In the end, only one will claim victory as The WOW Tag Team Champions of the World! Will speed overcome power and strength? Or will size dominate the underdogs?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Since day one when Abilene Maverick 'accidentally' poured tea on Stephy Slays, Stephy has endured Abilene’s teasing and bullying. After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard’s feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight’s Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self-proclaimed 'Grits N Glam' duo Jessie Jones and Amber O’Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa into a match against a deadly mystery opponent.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tonight has 'feud' written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star’s past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana’s past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail?
